single.name: Single Card
single.description: A single card for immediate guidance and clarity.

positions.label: The Card
positions.description: Your current energy and the guidance most relevant to you right now.

three-card.name: Past / Present / Future
three-card.description: Three cards illuminating the arc of time: where you have been, where you stand, and where you are heading.

positions.label: Past
positions.description: The energies and events that have shaped your current situation.

positions.label: Present
positions.description: The heart of your current situation and the forces at play right now.

positions.label: Future
positions.description: The emerging patterns and potential outcomes based on your current trajectory.

celtic-cross.name: Celtic Cross
celtic-cross.description: The complete Celtic Cross spread — ten cards mapping the full landscape of your situation.

positions.label: Present
positions.description: The heart of the matter — what covers you right now.

positions.label: Challenge
positions.description: What crosses you — the immediate obstacle or opposing force.

positions.label: Past
positions.description: The foundation — distant past influences that shaped the present.

positions.label: Future
positions.description: The crowning influence — what is coming into being.

positions.label: Above
positions.description: Your conscious goal or best possible outcome.

positions.label: Below
positions.description: The subconscious foundation — what lies beneath.

positions.label: Hopes & Fears
positions.description: Your inner hopes or fears about the outcome.

positions.label: Outcome
positions.description: The final outcome — where this path leads.
